prompt: For each support specialist, list the systems they work on.
expected: {"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "select it_support_specialists.name , systems.system_name from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id"}
